subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark jeans, stepping off the curb to cross the coastal street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears sneakers, hair ruffled by the sea wind; the red jacket glowing against the blue dusk
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark jeans, sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light tan, smooth youthful skin cool in the twilight
subjects.facial_features: Round face, wind-tousled hair, small features

subjects.description: A few parked cars along the curbs of the coastal residential street, roofs catching the last horizon glow
subjects.appearance_details: Weathered sedans and a wagon in muted salt-faded colors, faint dusk highlights along their damp roofs
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A coastal-town residential street on a North American rolling coastline at dusk, in blue-hour light. Weathered shingle and clapboard houses with sea-facing porches line a two-lane street that slopes gently toward a distant water horizon glowing with the last warm band of sunset. Wind-bent shrubs and a few parked cars line the curbs; salt has left a faint sheen on the asphalt. Sidewalks run beside the homes. Cool blue ambient light fills the scene while a warm orange strip lingers low on the horizon over faded center markings.

lighting.conditions: Blue-hour coastal dusk with a warm horizon afterglow
lighting.direction: Soft cool skylight overhead with a low warm glow from the seaward horizon
lighting.shadows: Very soft, long, cool-blue shadows with faint warm rim light from the horizon
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool blue twilight with a warm horizon band; the child's red jacket glows against the deep blue dusk

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Deep dusk blues, warm orange horizon band, weathered grey shingles, salt-sheened asphalt, and a glowing red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Windswept, tranquil coastal dusk calm heightened by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Wind-bent shrubs, a few parked cars, porch rails, the level water horizon

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child against the dimming blue-hour distance

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the coastal-town residential street at dusk.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the salt-sheened asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the salt-sheened asphalt, partially faded, dim in the blue-hour light
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the coastal-town street at blue-hour dusk, parked cars and a warm horizon band ahead.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly in the twilight.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely against the blue dusk.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a coastal-town residential street at blue-hour dusk, a warm horizon band glowing beyond the sloping road and parked cars. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch in the cool twilight. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the gusty dusk while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Coastal dusk sounds of gusty wind, distant surf, and a lone gull, the hum of the vehicle over salt-sheened asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a quiet idle with wind and surf in the background.
